title: Guarda, Centro — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Guarda, Centro: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Guarda is a city in Centro with a population of 31,294. Portugal’s highest city, with a stunning Gothic cathedral and gateway to the Serra da Estrela mountain range.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
